archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) accents for Trust Verification

typography.heading_h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-white
typography.heading_h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

surface_styles.glass_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

motion_guidelines.page_transition: framer-motion initial={opacity: 0, y: 20} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0} transition={duration: 0.5}

component_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons use blue-to-purple gradient background with white text. Apply hover scale 1.05 and soft shadow. Secondary buttons use transparent background with border-white/20.
component_instructions.trust_badges: Use neon green text with a glowing icon. Background should be bg-green-500/10 with border-green-500/30. Fully rounded-full px-3 py-1.
component_instructions.fraud_meter: Use Recharts or a custom SVG arc to display the AI Fraud Score (0-100). Red for low trust, Yellow for mid, Neon Green for 90+ trust.
component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn inputs. Background bg-slate-950/50, border-white/10. Focus ring should be primary purple.
component_instructions.navigation: Sticky top header using crystal glass style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/70. Border bottom white/10.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. For trust/verification, use shield, check-circle, zap.

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, cards MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='fraud-score-meter', data-testid='seller-listing-form').

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark premium tech background with subtle holographics

trust_icons.description: Neon green glowing 3D AI security shield

product_images.description: 3D Verified premium smartphone with green checkmark
